title: 5220FR2075L, 5220FR2006H Water Inlet Valve, Washing Machine Cold and Hot Side Water Valve Set, Compatible with 5221ER1003A 5221ER1003C
features: [Material]: The washer water inlet valve is made of high quality material, compact structure, stable performance, durable and can be used for a long time
[Good Performance]: The 5220FR2006H and 5220FR2075L water inlet valves control the hot and cold water respectively when the washing machine is working, improving its work efficiency and stability
[Tight Connection]: The washer water inlet valve features carefully processed thread to be tightly installed in the washing machine drain connector, not easy to come loose
[Good Compatibility]: The washer water inlet valve is compatible with several LG & Kenmore washing machines models as shown in the picture

[Wide Application]: This washing machine water inlet valve has model number of 5220FR2075L(cold) and 5220FR2006H (hot), can be replaced with 5221ER1003A, 5221ER1003C, 5221ER1003D, 5221ER1003F, 4322702, AP5986564, EAP11728995, IV-13SE-1, C-364/15-B16, 33690219, 33690233, PS11728995; H5220FR2006L, 5220FR2006Q, 1268123, AP4441935, PS3527427, EAP3527427
description: Feature: 【Strong Adaptability】This washing machine solenoid valve kit has strong compatibility and can be widely compatible with several models LG & Kenmore washing machines(As Shown). Note that you can use any model mentioned in the picture, if not, please buy with caution. 【Easy to Replace】This water inlet valve set's models are 5220FR2075L(cold) and 5220FR2006H (hot), which is very easy to replace and can interoperate with the following models that is very convenient. The replacement parts models of the former are 5220FR2075L, 5221ER1003A, 5221ER1003C, 5221ER1003D, 5221ER1003F, 4322702, AP5986564, EAP11728995, IV-13SE-1, C-364/15-B16, 33690219, 33690233, PS11728995; while the replacement parts models of the latter are 5220FR2006H, H5220FR2006L, 5220FR2006Q, 1268123, AP4441935, PS3527427, EAP3527427. 【Wear-Resistant and Rust-Proof】This washing machine water inlet valve who compatible with LG & Kenmore washing machine is made of stainless steel with good toughness, even if often subjected to scratching and friction will not easily produce serious wear and tear. In addition, it can also work for a long time in a humid environment and maintain the stability of performance to avoid serious rust. 【Installed Tightly】The metal plug of this washer water inlet valve replacement has been scientifically designed and carefully processed in order to be tightly installed in the washing machine drain connector, and even if the washing machine in the work of a larger vibration, it will not easily come loose. 【Kit Provided】You can use these two water inlet Valves, 5220FR2075L and 5220FR2006H, to control the cold and hot water respectively when the washing machine is working. It can help the machine to work much more efficiently and satbly which is very convenient. Specification: Material: Stainless Steel Model: 5220FR2075L, 5220FR2006H Replacement Part 5220FR2075L: 5220FR2075L, 5221ER1003A, 5221ER1003C, 5221ER1003D, 5221ER1003F, 4322702, AP5986564, EAP11728995, IV-13SE-1, C-364/15-B16, 33690219, 33690233, PS11728995 5220FR2006H: 5220FR2006H, H5220FR2006L, 5220FR2006Q, 1268123, AP4441935, PS3527427, EAP3527427 Size: As Shown Note: Please allow manual measurement error. Fitment: Compatible with Several Models LG & Kenmore Washing Machines(As Shown) Package Included: 2 PCS * 5220FR2075L (Cold), 5220FR2006H (Hot) Water Inlet Valves
